info.title: Data Use Governance - Data Discovery Worker Node
info.description: The Data Discovery Worker Node APIs enables secure communication with an on-premises Data Discovery worker node. It provides operations to retrieve, classify, and catalog data from connected data sources, as well as manage and update custom connector scan jobs. Unlike the main OneTrust application APIs, this API communicates directly with your worker node instance, using its hostname, FQDN, or IP address.

servers.description: This API is for directly communicating with the on-premises worker node. This API does not communicate with the OneTrust application, hence your hostname will be the hostname of your worker node.

hostname.description: This API is for directly communicating with the on-premises worker node. This API does not communicate with the OneTrust application, hence your hostname will be the hostname, FQDN, or IP address of your worker node.

tags.name: Custom Scan
tags.description: APIs to manage and execute custom data discovery scans across specified data sources.

get.description: Use this API to get details of any pending custom connecter scan jobs for the specified data source.

parameters.name: datasourceId
parameters.description: The data source's identifier. This value can be obtained using the [Get Data Sources](/onetrust/reference/getallusingget_1) API.

429.description: Too Many Requests. \nFor more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

post.description: Use this API to submit metadata for cataloging for a given custom connector scan job.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The custom connector scan job's identifier. This value can be obtained using the [Get List of Scan Jobs](/onetrust/reference/geteligiblejobsusingget) API.

parameters.description: The custom connector scan job's identifier. This value can be obtained using the [Get List of Scan Jobs](/onetrust/reference/geteligiblejobsusingget) API.

status.description: Status to which the job should be updated.

errorMessage.description: Error message that indicates the reason for using a status of FAILED.

jobId.description: The custom connector scan job's identifier. This value can be obtained using the [Get List of Scan Jobs](/onetrust/reference/geteligiblejobsusingget) API.

datasourceId.description: The data source's identifier. This value can be obtained using the [Get Data Sources](/onetrust/reference/getallusingget_1) API.

structured.description: Flag to determine whether the data source is a structured or unstructured source.

totalCount.description: Total Count of rows or lines sent for a given column/file.

content.description: List of content details from the data source.

endOfContent.description: Flag to determine whether this request is the final request for a given column/file.

jobId.description: The custom connector scan job's identifier. This value can be obtained using the [Get List of Scan Jobs](/onetrust/reference/geteligiblejobsusingget) API.

datasourceId.description: ID of the data source. This value can be obtained using the [Get Data Sources](/onetrust/reference/getallusingget_1) API.

metadataList.description: List of Metadata objects to catalog
